name: Adaptive Control Unit
description: Project Part #5. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

name: AI Expansion Server
description: Project Part #12. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Power Usage: 0-2000 MW (1000 MW average).  Growth is the metric by which we measure success.

name: AI Limiter
description: Controls AIs and keeps them from evolving in malicious ways. Super advanced electronics.

name: Alclad Aluminum Sheet
description: Used to make products that require high heat conduction or a high specific strength. Thin, lightweight, and highly durable.

name: Alien DNA Capsule
description: Translates organic chemicals into readable alien genetic information. Used for researching alien organisms.  Go the extra kilometer! Knowledge is power, and power is just efficiency with fewer steps. Depositing Alien DNA Capsules in the AWESOME Sink provides FICSIT with knowledge, and pioneers with Coupons.

name: Alien Power Matrix
description: This intricate condensed-matter matrix is used to enhance the output of the Alien Power Augmenter.  Initially developed in efforts to create a human-made Somersloop, the Alien Power Matrix cannot sustain the extra-dimensional energy connection on its own. However, it can effectively stabilize the energy stream of the Somersloop.

name: Alien Protein
description: Ground-up Alien Remains in a neat little package. Used for medical purposes and to research alien organisms.

name: Alumina Solution
description: Dissolved Alumina, extracted from Bauxite. Can be further refined into Aluminum Scrap for Aluminum Ingot production.

name: Aluminum Casing
description: A versatile container cast from Aluminum Ingots.

name: Aluminum Ingot
description: Smelted from Aluminum Scrap, which is refined from Alumina Solution. Used to produce specialized aluminum-based parts.

name: Aluminum Scrap
description: Refined from Alumina. Can be smelted into Aluminum Ingots for industrial usage.

name: Assembly Director System
description: Project Part #6. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  This extremely fast and precise computing system is specifically designed to direct the Project Assembly: Assembly Phase.

name: Automated Wiring
description: Project Part #3. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

name: Bacon Agaric
description: Consumable  Eat to restore 2 health segments.

name: Ballistic Warp Drive
description: Project Part #11. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  A large amount of force is required for the Warp Drives to activate, so sticking them to rockets was the logical next step. Additionally, results improved immensely when the observers were further removed from the Warp Drives upon activation.

name: Battery
description: Primarily used as fuel for Drones and vehicles.

name: Bauxite
description: Used to produce Alumina, which can be further refined into the Aluminum Scrap required to produce Aluminum Ingots.

name: Beryl Nut
description: Consumable  Eat to restore half a health segment.

name: Biochemical Sculptor
description: Project Part #10. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  Years ahead of the competition, this top-of-the-line 3D printer is used for the production of synthetic biological resources.

name: Biomass
description: Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use it for power. Biomass is much more energy-efficient than raw biological matter.

name: Black Powder
description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce simple explosives.

name: Blade Runners
description: An exoskeleton for the lower legs that assists movement, allowing pioneers to sprint faster and jump higher. Also dampens the impact of landing.

name: Blue Power Slug
description: A strange slug radiating an unknown weak power.

name: Cable
description: Used for crafting. Primarily used to build Power Lines.

name: Caterium Ingot
description: Smelted from Caterium Ore. Primarily used for advanced electronics.

name: Caterium Ore
description: Smelted into Caterium Ingots, which are primarily used for advanced electronics.

name: Chainsaw
description: Clears an area of flora that is too difficult to remove by hand.  Fuel: Biofuel

name: Circuit Board
description: Advanced electronics that have a plethora of different uses.

name: Cluster Nobelisk
description: Detonates into multiple smaller explosions. Practical for clearing out large areas of vegetation and other inconveniences.

name: Coal
description: Mainly used as fuel for vehicles & Coal-Powered Generators, or in Steel production.

name: Compacted Coal
description: A much more efficient alternative to Coal. Used as fuel for vehicles and Coal-Powered Generators.

name: Computer
description: A complex logic machine that is used to control advanced behavior in other machines.

name: Concrete
description: Used for building. Good for stable Foundations.

name: Cooling System
description: Keeps advanced parts and buildings from exceeding efficient temperature levels.

name: Copper Ingot
description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

name: Copper Ore
description: Used for crafting. A basic resource primarily used for electricity.

name: Copper Powder
description: Ground-up Copper Ingots. The high natural density of Copper, combined with the granularity of the powder, makes this part perfect for producing Nuclear Pasta in the Particle Accelerator.

name: Copper Sheet
description: Used for crafting. Primarily used for Pipelines due to its high corrosion resistance.

name: Crude Oil
description: Refined into all kinds of Oil-based resources, like Fuel and Plastic.

name: Crystal Oscillator
description: An electronic oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create an electrical signal with a precise frequency.

name: Dark Matter Crystal
description: Concentrated Dark Matter Residue that is isolated within a crystalline vessel. This form of containment allows for utilising Dark Matter reliably in other production processes.  Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).

name: Dark Matter Residue
description: Produced as a by-product of Quantum Encoding processes and alternatively generated in the Converter.  Various fields of science are still debating the nature and properties of Dark Matter. Meanwhile, FICSIT has found several applications for it in space-time manipulation.

name: Diamonds
description: Synthetic Diamonds produced by exposing Coal to extreme heat and pressure.  Used in the production of Time Crystals and Dark Matter Crystals.  Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average).

name: Dissolved Silica
description: Silica dissolved in Water, produced as part of the alternative refinement of Raw Quartz. The Silica can be extracted from the Water to complete the refinement process.

name: Electromagnetic Control Rod
description: Regulates power output via electromagnetism.

name: Empty Canister
description: Used to package fluids for transportation.

name: Empty Fluid Tank
description: Used to package gases and volatile liquids for transportation.

name: Encased Industrial Beam
description: Simultaneously utilizes the compressive strength of concrete and the tensile strength of steel. Mostly used as a stable base for constructing buildings.

name: Encased Plutonium Cell
description: Plutonium Pellets encased in concrete. Used to produce Plutonium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production.  Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average). ﻿Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

name: Encased Uranium Cell
description: Used to produce Uranium Fuel Rods for Nuclear Power production. Made from Uranium Ore.  Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

name: Excited Photonic Matter
description: Excited Photonic Matter is essential for all production processes in the Quantum Encoder.  Formed in the Converter by inducing intense photon interactions through exposure to SAM in a high-energy environment.

name: Explosive Rebar
description: Explodes on impact, dealing heavy damage.

name: Fabric
description: Used to craft equipment. Flexible but durable fabric.

name: Factory Cart™
description: The one and only FICSIT Factory Cart™. Now with special FICSIT-Foundation-only Grip Wheels, for an even smoother and faster factory floor experience!

name: FICSIT Coupon
description: A special FICSIT bonus program Coupon, obtained through the AWESOME Sink. Can be redeemed in the AWESOME Shop for bonus milestones and rewards.

name: Ficsite Ingot
description: Produced by reconstructing other metals on a molecular level using Strange Alien Matter.  Synthesized by FICSIT to be the perfect construction material, and used in the most high-end processes.

name: Ficsite Trigon
description: The Ficsite Trigon, made from Ficsite Ingots, is perfectly shaped for all construction challenges. Its performance is so exceptional, it basically solved structural engineering.

name: Ficsonium
description: Usage and production of this material is strictly prohibited. On Earth, that is. There are no rules in space, only efficiency.   Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average). Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

name: Ficsonium Fuel Rod
description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants. The power source that put FICSIT on the map. Literally. The crater is still there.  Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

name: Fuel
description: Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

name: Fused Modular Frame
description: A corrosion-resistant, nitride-hardened, highly-robust-yet-lightweight modular frame.

name: Gas Filter
description: Filters out toxins and pollutants from the air when used with a Gas Mask.

name: Gas Mask
description: Allows pioneers to breathe normally in toxic gas-filled areas. Consumes Gas Filters from the pioneer's inventory when in use.

name: Gas Nobelisk
description: Creates a deadly gas cloud instead of a regular explosion.

name: Golden Factory Cart™
description: The one and only Golden FICSIT Factory Cart™  You have now officially ascended.  Go forth now, Master of Spaghetti, God of the Factory, Sinker of Cups, Employee of the Planet... travel in STYLE!

name: Hatcher Remains
description: The shell-like remains of an alien... thing. Used for MAM research.

name: Hazmat Suit
description: Shields pioneers from the adverse effects of radiation.  Consumes Iodine-Infused Filters from the pioneer's inventory when worn in radioactive areas.

name: Heat Sink
description: Used to dissipate heat faster.

name: Heavy Modular Frame
description: A more robust multipurpose frame.

name: Heavy Oil Residue
description: A by-product of Plastic and Rubber production. Can be further refined into Fuel and Petroleum Coke.

name: High-Speed Connector
description: Connects multiple cables and wires in a very efficient way. Uses a standard pattern, so it has many varied applications.

name: Hog Remains
description: The carapace of an alien Hog creature. Used for MAM research.

name: Homing Rifle Ammo
description: The bullet guidance system built into this ammunition allows it to accurately hit any target within the reticle area. Especially useful when dealing with agile threats, or for pioneers who can't be bothered to aim properly.

name: Hoverpack
description: Power Consumption: 100 MW  Allows pioneers to move vertically and hover in mid-air to improve building efficiency and factory traversal. Wirelessly connects to nearby power connections, such as Power Poles and Buildings, for power consumption.  Slow-Fall: Hold {PlayerMovement_Jump} after losing connection mid-air. Disable Hoverpack: Double tap {PlayerMovement_Crouch} while hovering.

name: Iodine-Infused Filter
description: Absorbs radioactive particles when used with the Hazmat Suit.

name: Ionized Fuel
description: Fuel that has been ionized, allowing it to deliver incredible output. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

name: Iron Ingot
description: Used for crafting the most basic parts.

name: Iron Ore
description: Used for crafting. The most essential basic resource.

name: Iron Plate
description: Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.

name: Iron Rebar
description: Can be shot using the Rebar Gun for self-defense purposes.

name: Iron Rod
description: Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.

name: Jetpack
description: Allows pioneers to travel through the air with increased control.  Fuel is automatically consumed from the pioneer's inventory to refill the Jetpack while on the ground. Different fuel types can be used and provide different levels of Jetpack efficiency. The preferred fuel type will be used if available, and can be set in the equipment inventory.

name: Leaves
description: Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Leaves for power.

name: Limestone
description: Used for crafting. A basic resource primarily used for stable Foundations.

name: Liquid Biofuel
description: Liquid Biofuel can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

name: Magnetic Field Generator
description: Project Part #7. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  These modular generators use superconducting magnets and vast amounts of electricity to produce a powerful and easily expandable magnetic field.

name: Medicinal Inhaler
description: Fully restores health when used.  The FICSIT Medicinal Inhaler can be produced from a variety of different ingredients.

name: Mercer Sphere
description: A weird alien phenomenon. While the sphere appears liquid, it behaves like a solid and does not have any detectable mass. It seems to somehow interact with and have awareness of its environment.

name: Modular Engine
description: Project Part #4. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

name: Modular Frame
description: Used for crafting. A multipurpose building block.

name: Motor
description: Creates a mechanical force that is used to move things from machines to vehicles.

name: Mycelia
description: Used for crafting. Biomass Burners and vehicles can also use Mycelia for power.

name: Neural-Quantum Processor
description: The Neural-Quantum Processor utilizes a combination of neural network architecture and quantum computing techniques to achieve unprecedented performance. This technology has enabled some of FICSIT's biggest advancements in artificial intelligence and relativistic engineering.

name: Nitric Acid
description: Produced when Nitrogen Gas reacts with Water. Its high corrosiveness and oxidizing properties make it an excellent choice for refinement and fuel production processes.

name: Nitrogen Gas
description: Has a variety of uses, including metallurgy, cooling, and Nitric Acid production. On MASSAGE-2 (AB)b, it can be extracted from underground gas wells.

name: Nobelisk
description: A simple explosive, useful for clearing boulders, vegetation, and other obstacles.

name: Nobelisk Detonator
description: A remote-control device used to handle and detonate Nobelisks.

name: Non-Fissile Uranium
description: The Uranium-238 isotope is non-fissile, meaning it cannot be used for nuclear fission. It can, however, be converted into fissile Plutonium in the Particle Accelerator.  Caution: Mildly Radioactive.

name: Nuclear Pasta
description: Project Part #9. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly. Power Usage: 500-1500 MW (1000 MW average).  Nuclear Pasta is extremely dense degenerate matter, formed when extreme pressure forces protons and electrons together into neutrons. It is theorized to exist naturally within the crust of neutron stars.

name: Nuke Nobelisk
description: Uses a nuclear fission reaction to generate a massive explosion. WARNING: Ensure all FICSIT property is clear of the blast zone before detonation.

name: Object Scanner
description: Scans the area for a selected item. Beeps at a rate proportional to proximity and direction.

name: Packaged Alumina Solution
description: Alumina Solution, packaged for alternative transport.

name: Packaged Fuel
description: Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

name: Packaged Heavy Oil Residue
description: Heavy Oil Residue, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles.

name: Packaged Ionized Fuel
description: Ionized Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

name: Packaged Liquid Biofuel
description: Liquid Biofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

name: Packaged Nitric Acid
description: Nitric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

name: Packaged Nitrogen Gas
description: Nitrogen Gas, packaged for alternative transport.

name: Packaged Oil
description: Crude Oil, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles.

name: Packaged Rocket Fuel
description: Rocket Fuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

name: Packaged Sulfuric Acid
description: Sulfuric Acid, packaged for alternative transport.

name: Packaged Turbofuel
description: Turbofuel, packaged for alternative transport. Can be used as fuel for vehicles and the Jetpack.

name: Packaged Water
description: Water, packaged for alternative transport.

name: Paleberry
description: Consumable  Eat to restore 1 health segment.

name: Parachute
description: Slows down your fall when activated in mid-air.

name: Petroleum Coke
description: Used for crafting. A carbon-rich material distilled from Heavy Oil Residue.  Used as a less efficient Coal replacement.

name: Plastic
description: Versatile and easy to manufacture, this material has a wide range of uses.

name: Plutonium Fuel Rod
description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants.  Caution: Produces radioactive Plutonium Waste when consumed. Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.

name: Plutonium Pellet
description: Produced in the Particle Accelerator through conversion of Non-fissile Uranium. Used to produce Encased Plutonium Cells for Plutonium Fuel Rods.  Power Usage: 250-750 MW (500 MW average). Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

name: Plutonium Waste
description: The by-product of consuming Plutonium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Must be stored in a safe location. Handle with caution.  Caution: EXTREMELY Radioactive.

name: Polymer Resin
description: A by-product of Crude Oil refinement into Fuel. Commonly used to manufacture Plastic and Rubber.

name: Portable Miner
description: Automatically extracts a resource when placed on a resource node. Note: Has limited storage space.

name: Power
description: Power

name: Power Shard
description: Power Slug mucus compressed into a solid crystal-like shard.  It radiates a strange power.

name: Pressure Conversion Cube
description: Converts outgoing force into internal pressure. Required to contain unstable, high-energy matter.

name: Pulse Nobelisk
description: Generates a powerful shockwave instead of a regular explosion.

name: Purple Power Slug
description: A strange slug radiating a powerful unknown power.

name: Quartz Crystal
description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Used in the production of advanced radar technology and high-quality display screens.

name: Quickwire
description: Caterium's high conductivity and resistance to corrosion make it ideal for small, advanced electronics.

name: Radio Control Unit
description: Enhances and directs radio signals.

name: Raw Quartz
description: Can be processed into Quartz Crystals and Silica, which both offer a variety of applications.

name: Reanimated SAM
description: The active and contained form of the Strange Alien Matter.  Proper electromagnetic containment is required, as it appears to be able to manipulate the atomic bonds of any matter it comes into contact with.

name: Rebar Gun
description: An improvised ranged weapon for self-defense. Has to be reloaded after each use.

name: Reinforced Iron Plate
description: Used for crafting. A sturdier and more durable Iron Plate.

name: Rifle
description: A long-range, rapid-fire weapon. Specifically designed to deliver adequate performance within the designated work area.

name: Rifle Ammo
description: Standard issue Rifle ammunition, useful for establishing dominance.

name: Rocket Fuel
description: A high-impulse compressed gas fuel. Can be used as-is to power Fuel-Powered Generators, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles or the Jetpack.

name: Rotor
description: Used for crafting. The moving parts of a motor.

name: Rubber
description: A very flexible material that has a lot of friction.

name: SAM
description: Strange Alien Matter, commonly referred to as SAM, doesn't seem to follow the known laws of physics. It whispers of new possibilities.

name: SAM Fluctuator
description: The SAM Fluctuator is able to regulate and direct the behavior of Reanimated SAM through the application of electric charges with varying frequencies. This control facilitates technologies such as matter-to-energy conversion and spatiotemporal matter manipulation.

name: Screws
description: Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.

name: Shatter Rebar
description: Fractures when shot, launching deadly debris with wide spread but limited range.

name: Silica
description: Derived from Raw Quartz. Commonly used to create glass structures, in advanced refinement processes, and for alternative production of electronics.

name: Singularity Cell
description: Used to break down space and time. Required to power Portals.

name: Sink point
description: A special FICSIT bonus program Coupon, obtained through the AWESOME Sink. Can be redeemed in the AWESOME Shop for bonus milestones and rewards

name: Smart Plating
description: Project Part #1. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

name: Smokeless Powder
description: An explosive powder that is commonly used to produce modern firearms.

name: Solid Biofuel
description: The most energy-efficient form of solid Biomass. Can be used as fuel for the Chainsaw.

name: Somersloop
description: An odd alien object with a mind-bending, yet somehow familiar shape. It emits an unsettling energy.

name: Spitter Remains
description: The remains of a plasma-spitting alien creature. Used for MAM research.

name: Stator
description: Used for crafting. The static parts of a motor.

name: Steel Beam
description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

name: Steel Ingot
description: Smelted from a combination of Iron Ore and Coal. Can be made into several parts used in building construction.

name: Steel Pipe
description: Primarily used when constructing slightly more advanced buildings.

name: Stinger Remains
description: The remains of whatever that creepy thing was. Used for MAM research.

name: Stun Rebar
description: Electrocutes the target on impact, stunning it for a short time.  Stun Duration: 5 seconds

name: Sulfur
description: Primarily used to produce Black Powder.

name: Sulfuric Acid
description: Produced by combining Sulfur and Water in a complex reaction. Primarily used in refinement processes and Battery production.

name: Supercomputer
description: The next-gen version of a Computer.

name: Superposition Oscillator
description: An oscillator circuit that uses the mechanical resonance of a vibrating crystal to create a string vibration with a precise frequency. Often used in teleportation technology and dimensional manipulation.

name: Thermal Propulsion Rocket
description: Project Part #8. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.  Uses extreme heat to produce the high-pressure plasma required to get Project Assembly into motion.

name: Time Crystal
description: Time Crystals are Diamonds that have been reconfigured on a sub-atomic level in the Converter to retain a time-periodic self-organizing structure. This allows them to be used in the development of quantum processing and storage technologies.

name: Turbo Motor
description: A more complex and powerful version of the regular Motor.

name: Turbo Rifle Ammo
description: Lightweight, compact, and volatile. These rounds provide extreme capacity and rate of fire at the cost of accuracy.

name: Turbofuel
description: A more efficient alternative to Fuel. Can be used as-is to generate power, or packaged to be used as fuel for vehicles.

name: Uranium
description: A radioactive element.  Used to produce Encased Uranium Cells for Uranium Fuel Rods.  Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

name: Uranium Fuel Rod
description: Used as fuel for Nuclear Power Plants.  Caution: Produces radioactive Uranium Waste when consumed. Caution: Moderately Radioactive.

name: Uranium Waste
description: The by-product of consuming Uranium Fuel Rods in a Nuclear Power Plant. Non-Fissile Uranium can be extracted. Handle with caution.  Caution: HIGHLY Radioactive.

name: Versatile Framework
description: Project Part #2. Ship via the Space Elevator to complete phases of Project Assembly.

name: Water
description: It's water.

name: Wire
description: Used for crafting. One of the most basic parts.

name: Wood
description: Primarily used as fuel. Biomass Burners and vehicles can use Wood for power.

name: Xeno-Basher
description: A heavy self-defense electroshock melee weapon.

name: Xeno-Zapper
description: A standard issue self-defense electroshock melee weapon.

name: Yellow Power Slug
description: A strange slug radiating an unknown power.

name: Zipline
description: Provides faster traversal of factories by allowing pioneers to zip along Power lines. Activate the Zipline and aim at a nearby Power Line to connect to it.
